---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or a meaningful improvement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Lead with the user need, not the implementation. Who is affected? When does it bite? -->

## Sketch of a solution

<!-- A rough idea of how this could work. Words, mockups, or links — whatever you have. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you weigh, and why are they worse for this case? -->

## How would you know it's working?

<!-- The simplest scenario you'd run after the feature ships to feel confident. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: related OpenProject features, screenshots from other tools that nailed this, etc. -->
